en.welcome.title: Welcome to the setup of DataCat Flow
en.welcome.description: On this first configuration page, you can set up the most import settings of DataCat Flow. Afterwards, you can start using it with the DataCat client.
en.basic.title: Basic Settings
en.basic.description: Manage the basic settings of DataCat Flow.
en.basic.app.title: Application
en.basic.storage.title: Storage
en.basic.storage.description: Configure some storage settings for DataCat Flow. If you don't know what these settings mean, you should leave them as they are.
en.basic.app.hostname-description: The IP Address on which DataCat Flow is running. It must be reachable from the clients.
en.database.title: Database
en.updates.title: Update Settings
en.updates.description: Define how often DataCat Flow should check for updates and how to handle them.
en.security.title: Security Settings
en.security.description: Ensure your installation of DataCat Flow is properly secured.
en.security.admin.title: Administration user
en.security.admin.description:
This user has full access to everything in Flow. Therefore, you should secure it properly!
Tip: It is recommended to use a second factor, such as a FIDO2 key, Windows Hello or an Authenticator App.
en.security.2ndfactor.title: Second Factor Setup
en.finish.title: Review Settings and Finish Setup
en.finish.description: View the configuration you have made so far and confirm that everything is correct.
